race.description: Mekka Raceday On Sale Now 3Yo Mdn Plate
race.comment: Looks a wide-open contest. LISTEN JANI (10) has hit the top four in all three career efforts to date and will be cherry-ripe now third run back from the break. Gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a role in the finish. AGADOO (5) has been thereabouts in both outings since returning from Tasmania and should get a cosy run in transit from gate two. Looms as the main danger. MEDITERRA (12) resumes here but the form she showed when last in work was good enough for a race of this calibre. Tuned up for this with two recent trials and can run a big race while fresh. ARCTIC BRIGHT (6) has placed five of her past six starts and looks to be on the doorstep of a maiden victory. In the mix. MISHANI PRINCE (2) best of the rest.
